topic: Thai natural voice & script pipeline — TTS engines, voice cloning, prosody, Thai word segmentation, AI script writing, Pixelle-Video integration

focus: Survey all TTS engines for Thai language support
noveltyJustification: 11 of 13 engine evaluations are entirely new data (CosyVoice 3.5 Thai, Fish Audio S2 Pro, OpenAI TTS, Google Cloud, ElevenLabs, F5-TTS, Kokoro, MeloTTS, XTTS-v2 details); Edge-TTS and Index-TTS partially known from prior research

focus: CosyVoice 3.5 Thai deep-dive + Thai word segmentation + natural Thai script writing
noveltyJustification: 10 of 13 findings are fully new (CosyVoice Thai confirmation, architecture, cloning specs, FreeStyle mode, model sizes, installation, RL improvements, PyThaiNLP ecosystem, PyThaiTTS, segmentation requirement); 2 partially new (Thai honorifics, text normalization features); 1 negative result (no anti-AI Thai resources)
ruledOut: CosyVoice 3.0 base for Thai (only 9 languages pre-3.5)
English web search for anti-AI Thai script writing

focus: Quality comparison Edge-TTS vs CosyVoice, Pixelle-Video TTS integration code, Thai script naturalness from linguistics, prosody control, latency
noveltyJustification: 9.5 of 13 findings are new: CosyVoice Thai NOT native (correction), CosyVoice benchmarks, GPU/VRAM specs, Pixelle-Video TTSService architecture, sidecar integration path, 60+ Thai particles taxonomy, robotic-vs-natural guidelines, prompt template, FreeStyle prosody details, multi-engine confirmation, post-processing techniques; Edge-TTS SSML partially known; quality ranking partially refines prior data
ruledOut: CosyVoice as Phase 1 Thai TTS (only 9 native languages)
Thai MOS benchmark search (none exist in literature)
Edge-TTS emotion control (SSML only has rate/pitch/volume)

focus: Voice cloning Thai, Thai 5-tone TTS handling, cost comparison, GPU/latency, post-processing
noveltyJustification: 7 of 10 findings are fully new (ElevenLabs cloning tiers for Thai, voice cloning landscape table, phoneme-tone adaptive Thai TTS benchmarks NMOS 4.4, F5-TTS-THAI discovery, complete cost comparison table, latency benchmarks, post-processing pipeline); 2 partially new (GPU requirements refined from iter 3 data, Thai segmentation impact on specific engines); 1 consolidation (Thai tone system description)
ruledOut: OpenAI TTS voice cloning (no cloning capability)
Amazon Polly for Thai (uncertain support, not competitive)

focus: FINAL SYNTHESIS: F5-TTS-THAI investigation, prosody/emotion control (Q3), definitive ranking (Q1), complete pipeline architecture
noveltyJustification: 3 of 6 findings are fully new (F5-TTS-THAI model details + API, OpenAI gpt-4o-mini-tts style instruction mechanism, ElevenLabs v3 slider+textual emotion control details); 1 partially new (prosody ranking table synthesized from new + prior data); 2 consolidation (definitive ranking synthesized from all iterations, pipeline architecture consolidating all prior findings)
